sb_prompt: COMPARE YOUR OPINIONS AND THOSE OF THE OTHER CALLER ON CAPITAL PUNISHMENT.  DO EITHER OF YOU THINK IT SHOULD BE RESTRICTED TO CERTAIN CRIMES OR CIRCUMSTANCES?  HOW DO THE POLICIES AND PRACTICES OF YOUR STATE FIT WITH YOUR OPINIONS?
turns: So what are your thoughts on capital punishment? Do you think it should be restricted to certain crimes or circumstances?
Personally, I believe that capital pun
ishment should only be used for the most heinous crimes such as murder and treason. However, I also acknowledge that there needs
to be a fair and unbiased legal process in place before any execution can take place to ensure that justice is truly being served
. In my state, California, capital pun

isment has been abolished since 1972. This decision was made based on several factors including concerns over racial bias in sentencing and the potential for wrongful convictions. While some may disagree with this policy, overall I support
the move towards more humane forms of punishment
, such as life imprisonment without parole. Additionally, the cost of pursuing death penalty cases versus other types of criminal cases was also taken into consideration
, and ultimately led to the conclusion that it would be more fiscally responsible to focus resources elsewhere
. Overall, while I understand both sides of the argument regarding capital punish
ment, I personally lean towards supporting restrictions on its use and advocating for alternative forms of justice that prioritize rehabilitation and prevention
